title: If you don't take risk you won't win
html:
Title-only one-line aphorism from December 2020 by 17-year-old Yahir: "If you don't take risk you won't win." Direct restatement of the fear of not doing axiom, sibling phrasing to safe route is the risky route and 2019 05 20 if youre so afraid of failing youll never experience the win.

yahir gonzalez · fear of not doing · safe route is the risky route · 2019 05 20 if youre so afraid of failing youll never experience the win

related.label: 'If you're so afraid of failing, you'll never experience the winning' — May 2019 risk-tolerance line
The Safe Route Is the Risky Route
